summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Near Miss Investigation feature. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All investigation UI elements working correctly including severity buttons, progress dropdown, action/notes textareas, SWP checkboxes, and access control.

minor.issue: Admin user (4444) has manager_control=null instead of 'yes'. This doesn't affect functionality since admin_control='yes' grants investigation access.

passed_tests: Backend: Health check API
Backend: Admin login with employee 4444 (admin_control=yes)
Backend: Regular user login with employee 1447
Backend: Create near miss for investigation
Backend: Investigate near miss with RED severity
Backend: Investigate near miss with ORANGE severity
Backend: Investigate near miss with GREEN severity
Backend: Update investigation progress (not_started -> in_progress -> completed)
Backend: 404 returned for non-existent near miss investigation
Backend: Near miss list includes all investigation fields
Backend: All 3 SWP checkboxes can be set
Frontend: Near Misses list displays severity color dots
Frontend: Near Misses list displays progress badges (In Progress, Completed)
Frontend: Near Miss detail modal shows Investigation section
Frontend: Admin can see Edit/Add Investigation button
Frontend: Investigation form has severity buttons (Red/Orange/Green)
Frontend: Investigation form has progress dropdown (Not Started/In Progress/Completed)
Frontend: Investigation form has action textarea
Frontend: Investigation form has notes textarea
Frontend: Investigation form has 3 SWP checkboxes
Frontend: Save Investigation button works
Frontend: Investigation data persists after save
Frontend: Investigation display shows all saved data correctly
Frontend: Regular user (1447) cannot see Edit Investigation button
Frontend: Regular user can view investigation data (read-only)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend PUT /api/near-misses/{id}/investigate endpoint correctly implemented at line 2135
NearMiss model includes all investigation fields: severity, progress, action_required, investigation_notes, SWP checkboxes
Frontend NearMissesPage component correctly implements canInvestigate check (isAdmin || isManager)
Investigation form uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Severity buttons correctly styled with Red/Orange/Green colors
Progress dropdown has correct options: not_started, in_progress, completed
SWP checkboxes correctly labeled and functional
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test near misses with TEST_INVESTIGATION_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Near Miss Investigation feature is fully implemented and working. Backend API supports all investigation fields (severity, progress, action_required, investigation_notes, 3 SWP checkboxes). Frontend displays severity color dots and progress badges in list view, and shows full investigation form in detail modal for admin/manager users. Regular users can view but not edit investigations. Test data exists with TEST_INVESTIGATION_ prefix.
